name: Computershare Limited.
analysis: CPU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$35.3500. Trade idea: entry A$36.0000, stop A$33.1650, target A$44.5050 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
